name: American Assets Trust, Inc.
summary: PART I General Unless otherwise indicated or unless the context requires otherwise, references to we, our, us and our company refer to American Assets Trust, Inc., a Maryland corporation, together with our consolidated subsidiaries, including American Assets Trust, L.P., a Maryland limited partnership, of which we are the sole general partner and which we refer to in this report as our Operating Partnership.
